name: Pineapple-Bran Whole-Wheat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 8 oz can crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add the brown sugar to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg lightly.
4. Add the cereal, milk, and oil to the beaten egg. Stir until well mixed.
5. Allow the mixture to stand for 2 minutes or until the cereal has softened.
6. Gently stir in the crushed pineapple with its juice.
7. Gradually fold the flour mixture into the pineapple mixture until just combined.
8. Spoon the batter evenly into a paper-lined muffin tin.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Serve warm.
